stemHtml: During flight, some of the data inputs to the fly-by-wire (FBW) system become inaccurate. Which of the following statements applies?

options.a: The aircraft will have to be flown using a manual backup mode, as the FBW computer can not detect or handle this problem.
options.b: Some protections may be lost and the FBW may operate in a degraded mode, but can still be used.
options.c: The redundancy of modern FBW computers means that normal operation can continue and this will not present any problems.
options.d: Because the FBW computers receive inputs from different sources on the aircraft, the system can detect and correct the errors and will operate normally.
